title: Digital Versatility (DO NOT DOWNLOAD)
description: A modpack made for an SMP, Join us!
body:
![Digital Versatility, banner image stylized using the minecraft title font](https://i.imgur.com/MIUpUUF.png)
A personal modpack for SMP
Come play with us
Join the discord!
___
⚠️ Havent done anything to this in ages ⚠️
so please dont download. it does not work nor is the server for it up anymore.
⚠️ This is not a tech related pack! ⚠️
Don't mistake it for one
___
Now to stand and consider all possibilities
Is to drown in a tunneling sea of
Infinite Potentiality
___ ![art by koyorin](https://i.imgur.com/qPPTU9c.jpeg) ___
Digital Versatility - ParadiseEdition ___
Paradise
Edition
___
Paradise Edition adds many QoL and visual improvement mods. It also adds a couple different resourcepacks and shaderpacks. Because of that, Paradise is much harder on your system than the Lite edition
___
Modlist WIP
Digital Versatility - Lite (Recommended)Edition ___
Lite
Edition
___
Digital Versatility Lite, consists of the modpack with almost no extra client side features. Made for you to easily mix and match your client-side mods.
___
Modlist WIP
___ ![art by koyorin](https://i.imgur.com/Wj0m2PT.jpeg) ___
And that's when he realized
That to stand and consider all possibilities
Is to drown in a tunneling sea of
Infinite Potentiality
___
So, he changed his mind
___
